sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73337" key="o(loyuxe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὁλο-ψῡχέω</orth>, prob. misspelling of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὀλιγο-</foreign> or <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὀλιο-</foreign> (v. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὀλίγος</foreign>) <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ψυχέω,</foreign> <sense id="n73337.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be faint-hearted,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἐμοὶ μελήσι πώς σοι ἀρεστὰ ἔσται, μὴ ὁλοψυχήσῃς</quote_> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">PLond.ined.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4083.tlg001:2132" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2132</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> <date TEIform="date">(ii A. D.)</date>.</sense> </entryFree>
